points: Developed an AI agent for an anti-fraud engine using AWS Bedrock, enabling autonomous provider and tool selection based on real-time transaction context.
Designed serverless pipelines with AWS API Gateway and Lambda, supporting scalable, event-driven workflows.
Integrated Databricks notebooks into the data pipeline, enabling advanced analytics and real-time feature engineering for fraud detection models.
Implemented an observability strategy with CloudWatch and S3, centralizing logs and reducing incident diagnosis time.
Mentored junior engineers on backend best practices, architecture decisions, and code review standards.
Implemented a report generation pipeline with Kafka and Redis, cutting processing time from 3 hours to 40 seconds.
Developed communication integrations with embedded equipment via TCP/UDP sockets, reducing platform communication costs by 60%.
Developed and maintained backend microservices with Java and Spring Boot, ensuring high availability in a distributed environment.
Modeled and optimized MySQL databases, ensuring integrity and efficiency in critical system queries.
Mentored junior developers on code best practices, technical reviews, and architectural decisions.
Developed and maintained REST APIs in Java with Spring Boot, contributing to new features and improvements on the backend platform.
Fixed bugs, evolved requirements, and refactored existing systems to improve stability and maintainability.
Modeled and executed MySQL queries using JPA/Hibernate best practices to ensure data integrity and efficiency.
Integrated embedded devices via TCP/UDP sockets, gaining experience with low-level communication and real-time protocols.
Worked in team with agile methodologies (Scrum/Kanban), participating in planning meetings, reviews, and retrospectives.
Developed and maintained REST APIs using Java and Spring Boot, serving different clients and projects.
Implemented new features and fixed issues in existing backend applications.
Modeled and queried data in MySQL using JPA/Hibernate best practices.
Built hands-on experience in Java backend development, applying microservices concepts and continuous integration in real-world projects.

projects.title: Anti-Fraud AI Engine
projects.description: AI agent for real-time fraud detection with autonomous provider and tool selection based on transaction context

projects.title: Time Tracking System
projects.description: Employee clock-in/out platform with real-time dashboards, work hours analytics, overtime metrics, and automated reports. Includes a high-throughput report pipeline cutting processing from 3h to 40s

projects.title: Access Control System
projects.description: Real-time access control platform integrated with embedded devices via TCP/UDP sockets, managing entry/exit events and reducing communication costs by 60%

projects.title: License Management System
projects.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for client registration, subscription plan management, and license control with tenant isolation and automated billing workflows

personalProjects.title: AURA.DOC
personalProjects.description: AI-powered clinic management platform with a humanized AI agent that handles patient care 24/7 via WhatsApp — automating scheduling, confirmations, and patient CRM. Reduced no-shows by 60% and response time by 85%

personalProjects.title: IndieRek
personalProjects.description: Decision-based face matching API with biometric verification via a single POST request. Features custom thresholds, zero data retention, JWT auth, and sub-50ms latency

personalProjects.title: Gestão Integral
personalProjects.description: SaaS platform for service businesses to create professional quotes in minutes, track real costs, and visualize profit margins per project — eliminating spreadsheets and guesswork
